title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!
